name: Disjoint Set Union (Union-Find)
description: Implement a Disjoint Set Union (Union-Find) data structure with union by rank and path compression. Support: find(x) to find the root of x's set, union(x, y) to merge the sets containing x and y.

performance.stress_intent: exercise union idempotence, transitive connectivity, and same-set queries; performance enforcement is deferred
